name: Verify multi-language switcher, catalog navigation, and cart additions
description: Navigate through the home, catalog, and product detail pages, toggling between ID and EN languages, adding a product to the cart, and verifying that both page content and toast alerts update dynamically according to the active language.

planSteps.description: Click the EN button on the top right navigation bar to switch the website language to English
Click the SHOP link in the main navigation menu
Click the first product image or name in the catalog grid to open the product detail page
Click the Add to Bag button to add the selected coffee to the cart
Verify a toast notification pop-up appears containing the word 'added' in English
Click the ID button on the top right navigation bar to switch the website language back to Indonesian
Verify the main button text updates to read 'Tambah ke Keranjang' in Indonesian
